title: Can India remain the preferred emerging market for foreign investors?
summary: FPIs have taken out over  ₹2.6 lakh crore from the Indian capital market till 12 June this year, as per NSDL data. In Indian equities, they have offloaded  ₹2.9 lakh crore year-to-date.

title: The great, big, boring SpaceX IPO
summary: In the end, the space company’s debut was relatively mundane.

title: Where will Paras Defence's share price be in the next three years?
summary: The stock of Paras Defence has given very good returns to investors in the last few months. We examine the prospects of the company in the next three years.

title: No more Meta layoffs this year! Zuckerberg admits making mistake in AI workforce overhaul
summary: Mark Zuckerberg has told Meta staff the company will seek new positions for workers reassigned to AI training workflows following May's 10% global layoffs.

title: Anthropic ‘abruptly’ disables Fable 5, Mythos 5 to comply with US govt directive; says ‘this is a misunderstanding’
summary: Days after launching its most advanced AI models, Anthropic was ordered by the US government to block all foreign nationals from Fable 5 and Mythos 5. The company says it is a misunderstanding.

title: Paramount wins DOJ approval for Warner Bros. Discovery merger as $7 million daily fee deadline looms
summary: Paramount beat Netflix for Warner Bros. Discovery, and now has DOJ approval for a $110 billion deal, though California and the EU are still to rule.

title: Earning FD interest? Why you should submit Form 121 — TDS provisions explained
summary: A bank deducts 10% TDS if the interest payable on a customer’s fixed deposit exceeds  ₹50,000 ( ₹1 lakh for senior citizens) in a financial year. A customer must submit Form 121 to avail a TDS exemption. However, interest must still be declared at the time of filing the ITR.

title: SpaceX surges past $2 trillion in Nasdaq debut: How much your  ₹5 lakh investment could be worth by 2030
summary: SpaceX's IPO valued the company at $2 trillion, making it the sixth-largest U.S. company and turning Elon Musk into the first trillionaire. Investors are optimistic about its potential but face volatility as SpaceX is unprofitable with a price-to-revenue ratio of 112.

title: 29-year-old laid-off MNC employee with  ₹5 crore net worth asks: ‘Should I be satisfied…?’
summary: The Redditor shared that his personal net worth stands between  ₹5 crore and  ₹6 crore, while his wife's assets are worth approximately  ₹2 crore. He added that his wife, who earns  ₹40,000 per month, has reassured him that she would stand by him during this period.

title: One EMI, better control: How debt consolidation improves financial discipline and repayment management
summary: Are you drowning in multiple EMIs? Debt consolidation can simplify repayments, improve cash flow, reduce missed payments, strengthen financial discipline, and help borrowers build healthier long-term debt management habits.

title: 5 powerful money lessons I learned from the world’s first trillionaire, Elon Musk
summary: Elon Musk faced severe challenges in 2008 with SpaceX and Tesla but remained dedicated to his long-term vision. Similarly, consistent investments create more wealth than chasing quick gains, highlighting the importance of a long-term approach to investing.

title: HDFC AMC data breach: Reset password, watch for SIM-swap - What you should do? What it means for your MF Investments?
summary: HDFC AMC has confirmed a data breach. Your mutual fund investments are safe, but your personal data may be at risk. Here is what investors must do now.

title: Bank holiday today, June 13: Are SBI, HDFC Bank, and other banks closed on Saturday?
summary: &nbsp;Banks across India are closed on specified holidays, including second and fourth Saturdays and Sundays. Online banking remains operational during these closures for uninterrupted access to financial services.
